name: Pecan Crunch Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chopped apples in a large bowl.
2. Add the brown sugar, granulated sugar, egg yolk, vanilla extract, and lemon juice to the bowl with the apples. Mix well.
3. Stir in the chopped pecans.
4. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-45 minutes or until the apples are tender and brown.
6. Yield: one 9-inch pie.
